description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Turbinia E2E Test that runs on push and pull request events. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to run end-to-end tests for Turbinia with different Docker base images and gift PPA tracks. The workflow checks out the code, sets up Docker Buildx, builds Turbinia API server, server, and worker Docker images, prepares and displays Turbinia configuration, patches docker-compose config, and runs E2E tests.
